mentions.note: Cruise line whipsawed by Iran/oil trading; subject to roulette-like geopolitical speculation; not suitable for investors without edge.
Down 2.9%; cruise lines represent vacation spending; weakness contradicts 'long on money, short on time' narrative that had sustained travel demand.
Not recommended; at risk from travel disruption and oil exposure; only Viking gets endorsement in cruise sector.

Up 19% on spectacular 2026 guidance + wave season crush. Two-thirds booked; AI yield management driving higher pricing. River cruises, Discovery class, Caribbean secular tailwinds all firing. Service business exponential.
